rationale: Educ. Code §12.122 governs fiduciary liability of charter school board members. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 12.122. LIABILITY OF MEMBERS OF GOVERNING BODY OF OPEN-ENROLLMENT CHARTER SCHOOL.
_note: Rule text is topically unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
